payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark-stained wooden cabinet back showing vertical recessed rectangular panels and a semi-gloss finish with slight wear at panel edges; only the upper/mid section is visible and appears approximately 0.8 m from the camera.
